form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last preparation didn't finish the race at Dieppe June 12 over 3800m. Prefer to see her go around again before recommending.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-19). Back after a long spell. Only had one start last preparation didn't finish the race at Dieppe June 12 over 3800m. Prefer to see her go around again before recommending.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd of 12 at Le Lion-d'angers on April 5 over 2000m, 1.3 len behind Kumran with 57.5kg at $25. The race before that eased back early on 6th of 11 at Durtal on March 22 over 2300m, 5 len behind Lempira carrying 67.5kg. Going well and should be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Resuming after three months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign eighth of 12 at Deauville All Weather January 9 over 1900m, 6 len behind Harry Bassett with 56.5kg at $42. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second last of 16 at Chantilly All Weather January 31 over 1900m, 21 len behind Aslan Senora with 58kg at $13. Later on perhaps.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by 0.8 len at Le Mans March 4 over 1950m defeating Nour Aya carrying 60kg at $4.50. The race before that 14th of 16 at Deauville All Weather on January 23 over 1900m, 10 len behind L'hippocampe carrying 56kg at $16. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

form.formComment: At the latest run 14th of 16 at Compiegne on March 27 over 2000m, slow going 5.5 len behind Inkiostro carrying 58kg at $18. The race before that made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 14 at Saint-Cloud on March 10 over 2000m, slow going 2.5 len behind Vianeta carrying 59.5kg at $27. Others have better credentials.
